meaning: String label or name of the entity
has attribute (SIO) — links strain to phenotype attribute node
Indicates associated phenotype or gene entity
URL of strain detail page on NBRP Medaka
Depositing organisation (blank node; English label resolved via rdfs:label)
Strain identifier (correctly-spelled dc:identifier; endpoint normalizes dc:identifiere→dc:identifier in frequency counts, but extraction uses UNION of both typo forms)
Has genomic segment (links to Ensembl gene)
Genomic feature — source typo of genomic_feature
Strain identifier — source typo of dc:identifier (40 subjects, strains with allele info)
Variant of — source typo of variant_of (SO)
Responsible resource — source typo of ResponsibleResource
refers to (SIO) — links association node to medaka IRI or disease IRI (2 per assoc)
has value (SIO) — cosine similarity score (xsd:float, range 0–1)
has measurement value (SIO) — links association node to metric node
is model for (RO) — medaka strain is used as model for human disease
has phenotype (RO) — medaka strain has Human Phenotype Ontology term
